hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); case "$f" in *stashTests/*Tests.swift) cls=$(basename "$f" .swift); out=$(xcodebuild test -project stash/stash.xcodeproj -scheme stash -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 16' -only-testing:"stashTests/$cls" 2>&1) || { printf '%s failed:\n' "$cls"; printf '%s\n' "$out" | grep -iE 'error:|fail|Executed [0-9]' | tail -25; exit 2; } ;; esac
